name: Darrow Table Lamp - 11.75 Inch Height - TBL4447 - Cream - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the darrow table lamp, a stunning blend of wood and iron craftsmanship. Standing at 11.75 inches, this lamp is designed to infuse warmth into any room with its soothing cream color. The sophisticated combination of materials offers a charming touch, making it an ideal addition to a variety of decor styles. Perfect for a bedside table or living room accent, this lamp creates a cozy and inviting atmosphere. Its timeless design shines with soft elegance, while the subtle tones seamlessly complement your interior. Discover how the darrow table lamp can transform your environment into a serene retreat with its elegant presence and warm glow. Add a touch of sophistication and create the perfect ambiance in your space.
